description:
GOAL: Define fz-IR data types. Pure data structures + pretty-printer + builder API. No translation, no execution yet. Foundation for .11.4 (AST→IR), .11.5 (IR interp), .11.6 (liveness), .11.7-.11.9 (codegen).

## Decisions captured (do not relitigate)

- CPS is canonical (NOT ANF first). Frames ARE continuations; making CPS the IR's natural form means no separate transformation pass is needed. Confirmed during planning vs. ANF + later CPS-pass.
- Frames are structs with per-fn schemas. Each fn def produces an fz-IR fn whose CPS form has a frame schema describing live locals across calls + a continuation pointer slot.
- Multi-clause dispatch lowers to a sequence of if-then-else continuations (NOT a runtime dispatch table).
- Continuations are first-class values in IR: `Cont = { fn_id, captured_locals }`.
- Structs as foundational primitive: under-the-hood now (frames, tuples, future records); user-definable later. Continuations are just special-purpose structs (alignment-friendly, schema-driven trace).

## Deliverables (new src/fz_ir.rs or src/ir/mod.rs)

```rust
pub struct Module {
    fns: Vec<FnIr>,
    schemas: Vec<Schema>,            // referenced by frame_schema_id
}

pub struct FnIr {
    id: FnId,
    name: String,                    // debug
    frame_schema_id: u32,            // populated in .11.6
    blocks: Vec<Block>,
    entry: BlockId,
}

pub struct Block {
    params: Vec<Var>,
    stmts: Vec<Stmt>,
    terminator: Term,
}

pub enum Stmt {
    Let(Var, Prim),
}

pub enum Term {
    Goto(BlockId, Vec<Var>),
    If(Var, BlockId, BlockId),
    Call { callee: FnId, args: Vec<Var>, continuation: Cont },
    TailCall { callee: FnId, args: Vec<Var> },   // forwards our continuation
    Return(Var),                                  // call our frame's continuation
    Halt(Var),                                    // process result (top-level)
}

pub struct Cont {
    fn_id: FnId,
    captured: Vec<Var>,              // values to splice in when invoked
}

pub enum Prim {
    Const(Const),
    BinOp(BinOp, Var, Var),
    UnOp(UnOp, Var),
    AllocStruct(u32 /*schema_id*/, Vec<Var>),
    Builtin(BuiltinId, Vec<Var>),
    ListCons(Var, Var),
    ListHead(Var),
    ListTail(Var),
    ListIsNil(Var),
    // more added in .11.10-.11.14 per heap type
}

pub struct IrBuilder { /* fluent API */ }
```

Pretty-printer (Display impl).

## Tests

- Build a small IR module by hand; pretty-print round-trips at least visibly.
- Unit tests on builder API (let_, call, tail_call, etc.).

## Out of scope

- AST → fz-IR translation (.11.4)
- IR interpreter (.11.5)
- Cranelift codegen (.11.7+)
title: fz-IR types + builder (CPS canonical form)
